description: Former French MP Pierre Person discusses the transformative potential of blockchain technology and Web3 in democratizing finance and enhancing transparency. He emphasizes the importance of good regulation to foster innovation and job creation while educating policymakers on the technology's benefits.
topic_summary: Pierre Person highlights how blockchain can revolutionize finance by making it more accessible and transparent, while stressing the need for appropriate regulation to support innovation and public interest [t=20:44].
